accounts.name: mint
docs: The SPL token mint (USDC)

errors.name: CommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: Commitment hash does not match revealed plaintext

errors.name: BookNotDelegated
errors.msg: OrderBook is not delegated to ephemeral rollup

errors.name: NotLiquidatable
errors.msg: Position does not meet liquidation threshold

errors.name: FillNotFound
errors.msg: Fill not found or already claimed

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the position owner

errors.name: SelfMatch
errors.msg: Self-match: trader cannot match own orders

errors.name: OracleFuture
errors.msg: Oracle publish_time is in the future

errors.name: OrderBookAccountNotEmpty
errors.msg: Order book PDA is already initialized

errors.name: OrderBookInitIncomplete
errors.msg: Order book data is not full size yet

types.name: CollateralVault
docs: Mainnet PDA: seeds = [b"vault", market]
This is the authority PDA over the SPL token account.

fields.name: size_band
docs: 0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large, 3=Whale

fields.name: claimed
docs: 1 if claimed

types.name: Market
docs: Mainnet PDA: seeds = [b"market", asset_id]

fields.name: asset_id
docs: 8-byte asset identifier

fields.name: oracle_feed_id
docs: Pyth feed id for this market's oracle

fields.name: total_long_size
docs: Total open long size in lots

fields.name: total_short_size
docs: Total open short size in lots

fields.name: cum_funding_long
docs: Cumulative funding index for longs (signed, scaled by 1e9)

fields.name: cum_funding_short
docs: Cumulative funding index for shorts (signed, scaled by 1e9)

fields.name: realized_loss_pool
docs: Realized losses collected from losing closes and liquidations.
Winning closes may only withdraw PnL that is backed by this pool.

fields.name: admin
docs: Authority that initialized this market

types.name: Order
docs: Each order stored in the OrderBook fixed arrays.
96-byte fixed layout: 4 orders per price level × 256 levels per side = 1024 max per side.
`side` field is redundant on-chain (location implies side) but kept so events
and tombstone-marked entries can be inspected without context.
`_pad` ensures `[Order; 4]` packs cleanly with the level header on 8-byte alignment.

fields.name: side
docs: 0 = Long (bid), 1 = Short (ask)

fields.name: size_band
docs: 0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large, 3=Whale

types.name: OrderBook
docs: Delegated to ER PDA: seeds = [b"book", market]
Sizing math (target: ≤ 256KB so commit cost stays bounded):
Order      = 96 bytes (see Order)
PriceBucket = 16 (header) + 4 * 96 = 400 bytes
Fill       = 112 bytes
bids       = 256 * 400 = 102_400 bytes  (1024 resting orders)
asks       = 256 * 400 = 102_400 bytes  (1024 resting orders)
fills      = 256 * 112 =  28_672 bytes  (ring buffer)
metadata   = 32 (market) + 7*8 (counters) + 16 (pad) = 104 bytes
discriminator = 8
total      ≈ 233_584 bytes  (~228 KB)
Why not smaller:
- Anchor zero_copy + #[repr(C)] gives us O(1) access without per-field deser.
- 256 levels per side covers the realistic crossing band on a perp book —
BTC perp at 0.10$ ticks needs ~50 levels per 0.5% band; we leave headroom.
- 4 orders per level is enough for time-priority queueing within a tick;
overflow returns FillQueueFull and the caller can re-price.
MagicBlock ER caps individual account size at 10 MB; the binding constraint
is commit bandwidth, not size. Empirically, MagicBlock streams deltas at
commit_frequency_ms cadence so a 228KB account commits in < 50ms.

fields.name: next_order_id
docs: Monotonically increasing order id counter (starts at 1; 0 = tombstone marker)

fields.name: next_fill_id
docs: Monotonically increasing fill id counter

fields.name: bid_count
docs: Number of valid bids (sorted descending by price)

fields.name: ask_count
docs: Number of valid asks (sorted ascending by price)

fields.name: fill_count
docs: Current number of fills in the ring buffer (wraps at FILL_QUEUE_CAP)

fields.name: fill_head
docs: Ring buffer write cursor

fields.name: is_delegated
docs: Set to 1 when book is delegated to ER, 0 otherwise. Match must be 1; mainnet ix must be 0.

types.name: Position
docs: Mainnet PDA: seeds = [b"pos", market, owner, position_idx_le_bytes]

fields.name: size_lots
docs: Size in lots (revealed at settlement)

fields.name: entry_price_ticks
docs: Entry price in price ticks

fields.name: collateral_locked
docs: Collateral locked for this position (USDC micro-units)

fields.name: last_funding_index
docs: Last cum_funding_long or cum_funding_short value when funding was accrued

types.name: PriceBucket
docs: Each price level holds up to 4 orders (time-priority within the price/band).
price_ticks == 0 means empty bucket. count == 0 with price != 0 means an
emptied-but-not-yet-compacted slot (cheap to skip, expensive to shift).
16-byte header keeps the Order array 8-byte aligned (Solana BPF requirement).

types.name: UserAccount
docs: Mainnet PDA: seeds = [b"user", market, owner]

fields.name: deposited_amount
docs: Total deposited (in token lamports, i.e. USDC micro-units)

fields.name: locked_amount
docs: Amount currently locked as collateral across open orders + positions

fields.name: realized_pnl
docs: Cumulative realized PnL (signed, in token lamports)

fields.name: next_position_idx
docs: Monotonically increasing index for position PDAs
